---
name: "🎤 New Judge Proposal"
about: "Propose a new domain-specific judge for the Nigam panel"
labels: ["judge", "enhancement"]
---

## Judge Name
Named after which Indian music personality? (and why they fit)

## Domain
What aspect of code quality does this judge evaluate?
(e.g., security, accessibility, ML/data, frontend, DevOps)

## Scoring Criteria
What specific things does this judge check? (List 5-8 criteria)

## Sample Roast (Anu Malik mode)
If this judge had an Anu Malik variant, what would a sample roast sound like?

## Your Background
What qualifies you to define this judge's criteria? (brief, informal)
